lesson_title: Small Language Model Development Comprehensive Course Interview Suite

junior.question: Walk through the process of training a custom 1B parameter SLM from dataset collation to model evaluation.
junior.preparation_guide: Trace data cleaning → tokenization → PyTorch/Trainer setup → AMP training → perplexity evaluation.
junior.explanation: SLM training involves tokenizing domain text, configuring causal language modeling loss, training with mixed precision, and tracking evaluation perplexity.
junior.star_framework_tip: Explain each phase clearly and highlight memory management choices.
common_pitfalls: Skipping validation loss monitoring during training

mid_level.question: How do you implement 4-bit QLoRA fine-tuning for a domain-specific SLM while maintaining high target accuracy?
mid_level.core_intent: Tests QLoRA implementation and hyperparameter optimization.
mid_level.preparation_guide: Discuss BitsAndBytes NF4 quantization, double quantization, paged optimizers, and target module selection.
mid_level.explanation: QLoRA quantizes base model weights to 4-bit NormalFloat while training 16-bit LoRA adapters, drastically reducing VRAM requirements.
mid_level.star_framework_tip: Detail BitsAndBytesConfig setup and specify target modules.
common_pitfalls: Only applying LoRA to q_proj and v_proj matrices instead of all linear layers

senior.question: Architect an end-to-end automated SLM retraining, quantization (AWQ), red-teaming, and vLLM serving pipeline for high-concurrency production applications.
senior.core_intent: Evaluates senior AI platform engineering and production SLM lifecycle architecture.
senior.preparation_guide: Cover automated retraining pipelines, AWQ quantization, bias safety auditing, vLLM continuous batching, and canary deployment.
senior.explanation: Enterprise SLM architecture links automated data pipelines with parameter-efficient retraining, 4-bit AWQ quantization, safety auditing, and high-throughput vLLM inference clusters.
senior.star_framework_tip: Draw the architecture diagram, detail latency SLAs, and explain rollback safety checks.
common_pitfalls: Exposing fine-tuned models without automated safety red-teaming
